subject: A centaur in armor with a smaller companion clinging to bookshelves beside them
description: A muscular centaur with pointed ears crouches or leans on a broken stone ledge, wearing layered blue and brown armor, appearing to steady or assist someone. To the right, a smaller elf-eared figure with curly red-brown hair clings to a tall wooden bookshelf packed with books, reaching upward with one arm extended. The setting blends outdoor elements — large potted plants, trees — with an interior-like wall of shelves, suggesting a library courtyard or academic district. The mood is energetic and cooperative.
foreground: Centaur in armor on broken stone ledge; elf-eared figure clinging to bookshelf
background: Tall bookshelf with books, potted plants, stone architecture, trees
emotion: cooperative urgency; the pair are working together toward a shared goal
